changeSet.author: hdim-performance
changeSet.comment: Add covering indexes to improve FHIR query performance - Patient queries by tenant and resource type - Observation queries by patient and date - Condition queries by patient and onset date These composite indexes eliminate index scans and reduce I/O operations. Note: Using non-concurrent index creation for Liquibase compatibility. For production migrations on large tables, consider manual CONCURRENTLY with runInTransaction=false.
changeSet.sql: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_patients_tenant_resource ON patients(tenant_id, resource_type, id);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_observations_patient_tenant ON observations(patient_id, tenant_id, effective_datetime DESC);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_conditions_patient_tenant ON conditions(patient_id, tenant_id, onset_date DESC);
